title: HomeTown Global Group is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: HomeTown Global Group is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HomeTown Global Group! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HomeTown Global Group:
HomeTown Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeTown Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
